posts.author: Ronit (Ronit Vlodinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are super excited to announce that Elevate New York is SOLD OUT!!
If you haven’t reserved a spot for London yet, I suggest you do it fast! This is a great opportunity to meet our top customers and partners face to face.
Can’t wait to see you all there

Elevate 2024 by monday.com
